subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-02-01
subcodes.first_line: We were speaking today about the religion of the Druzes. All along they have been most kind to us and how appropriate it would have been if the Fragrances of the Merciful reach also their nostrils! The Blessed Perfection visited Abu Sinan
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @methods of teaching the Cause, @harmony of science and religion, @priestcraft
